summary: Iteration 76 - Testing bulk delete, new leads inbox, Book Service banner, and bulk campaign template fixes. All features working correctly.
test_credentials: Admin auth via localStorage: asrAdminAuth=true, asrAdminEmail=support@asrenterprises.in
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) POST /api/crm/leads/bulk-delete endpoint works correctly (returns 400 for empty list, 200 with deleted_count for valid IDs), 2) GET /api/crm/new-leads returns ALL new leads by default (source=all), can filter with source=whatsapp, 3) New Leads Inbox has Call button (tel: links), WhatsApp button, and Bulk Delete button (visible when leads selected), 4) Book Service banner is prominently displayed at top of ZeroBillHero section with price ₹2,499, 5) WhatsApp templates with variable_count=0 (like hello_world) correctly configured to not send variables.

backend: POST /api/crm/leads/bulk-delete - validates empty list (400), deletes with valid IDs (200)
GET /api/crm/new-leads - returns all sources by default
frontend: Book Service banner visible at top of ZeroBillHero section
Banner shows 'Book Solar Service' with price ₹2,499
Banner is clickable with 'Click to Book Now' text
New Leads Inbox shows 'New Inquiries' header
New Leads shows leads from ALL sources (Website, Test, Bulk_Import, Manual_bulk)
Call buttons (tel: links) present on each lead row
WhatsApp buttons present on each lead row
Bulk Delete button appears when leads are selected
Bulk Mark Contacted button appears when leads are selected
Bulk Assign button appears when leads are selected

features_verified.bulk_delete_endpoint: Working - POST /api/crm/leads/bulk-delete validates input and deletes leads
features_verified.new_leads_all_sources: Working - GET /api/crm/new-leads returns all sources by default, not just WhatsApp
features_verified.call_button: Working - Blue phone icon (tel: link) on each lead in New Leads Inbox
features_verified.bulk_delete_ui: Working - Red delete button appears in header when leads are selected
features_verified.book_service_banner: Working - Prominently displayed at top of ZeroBillHero section with ₹2,499 price
features_verified.template_variable_handling: Working - Templates with variable_count=0 configured correctly
